must.title: Proper semantic HTML or role
must.description: Use <button> element or role="button" on interactive element

must.title: Accessible button text
must.description: Button must have perceivable text content or aria-label

must.title: Keyboard accessible
must.description: Button must be operable via keyboard (Tab, Enter/Space)

should.title: Disabled state indication
should.description: Disabled buttons should have disabled attribute or aria-disabled="true"

should.title: Explicit button type
should.description: Specify type attribute: button, submit, or reset

should.title: Focus indicator
should.description: Provide visible focus indicator for keyboard navigation

avoid.title: Avoid using div/span as button
avoid.description: Don't use <div> or <span> with click handlers instead of <button>

avoid.title: Image-only buttons
avoid.description: Don't use images as button without alt text or aria-label

react.label: React Button Component

html.label: HTML Button
html.code:
<button type="button" aria-label="Description of action">
  Click me
</button>

tests.title: Screen Reader Test
steps: Verify button name, role, and state are announced
